prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约1955名、1562名、2699名、2008名、2386名，波动较大，整体呈后移趋势；2023年位次大幅后移至2699名，2024年回                         升至2008名，2025年再次后移至2386名；近3年（2023-2025）累计后移约313名，2025年基准位次约2386名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类计划数：2021年26人、20                        22年26人、2023年22人、2024年23人、2025年22人，基本稳定在22-26人区间；2026年计划扩至29人，较2025年增加7人（增幅约31.8%），扩招幅度较大，将推动最低                         位次后移。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年社会热度推荐（偏热），电子信息/通信高热推荐，电气工程高热推荐，数学/统计推荐偏热，这些热门方向与北师大物理类招生专业                        （数学类、物理学类含计算机、人工智能等）高度相关，将吸引考生报考；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约299000人，按近年物理类占比约70%估算约209300人，与2025年物理类2                        07171人基本持平，考生规模未明显变化；校本部位于北京市，非贵州省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在贵州省物理                         类招生占比约0.3%-0.5%，属外省招生规模较小的985高校，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2386名、2026年招生计划扩招31.8%这一主要利空因素                         ，以及学校顶尖层次（软科第19名）、18个A-及以上优势学科、热门专业（计算机/电子信息/数学）高社会热度等利多因素，两者对冲后位次将适度后移。预测最低位次约2892名                        ，区间2562–3222名。

一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、统计学、数学励耘实验班等）
- 物理学类（含物理学、计算机科学与技术、人工智能、天文学等）。

- 社会科学试验班（含经济学、金融学、法学、工商管理、会计学等）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2562-3222名内，建议以二档理科试验班、社科试验班为主攻方向，一档数学类、物理学类作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（如2500名以内）可重点冲刺一档王                        牌专业（数学类含A级数学、统计学）；位次接近区间上限（3200名左右）建议以三档教育学类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1955, 1562, 2699, 2008, and 2386 respectively, showing significant fluctuations with an overall backward trend; in 2023, the ranking dropped sharply to 2699, rebounded to 2008 in 2024, and fell again to 2386 in 2025; over the past three years (2023-2025), the cumulative backward shift is about 313 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2386 in 2025; the university's planned enrollment in Guizhou Province for science/physics category: 26 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, remaining stable in the 22-26 range; in 2026, the plan expands to 29, an increase of 7 (approximately 31.8%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will push the minimum ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, with sustained appeal to high-scoring students; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 6 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, and Marxist Theory), with Mathematics A, Physics A-, Chemistry A-, Statistics A, Ecology A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Systems Science A-, etc., highly matching the physics category enrollment majors (Mathematics, Physics, Science Experimental Class, etc.), demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving responses to school management-related public opinion, with no major negative incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 37th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure; in 2022, Jiangxi experienced an abnormal signal of a significant drop in admission rankings (low attention), but no similar record of gaps has been seen in Guizhou.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was recommended as hot in 2024 (relatively popular), Electronics/Communication is highly hot, Electrical Engineering is highly hot, and Mathematics/Statistics is recommended as relatively hot; these popular directions are highly correlated with BNU's physics category enrollment majors (Mathematics, Physics including Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), attracting applicants; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 209,300 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 70%, roughly the same as the 207,171 in 2025, indicating no significant change in candidate scale; the main campus is located in Beijing, not a local university in Guizhou, so there is no local enrollment preference; the university's physics category enrollment in Guizhou accounts for about 0.3%-0.5%, a small proportion for a 985 university recruiting outside its province, limiting the impact of regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2386 and the major negative factor of a 31.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, along with positive factors such as the university's top-tier level (19th in Soft Science), 18 A- and above advantageous disciplines, and high social popularity of hot majors (Computer Science/Electronics/Mathematics), the ranking will moderately shift backward after offsetting. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2892, with a range of 2562–3222.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, Mathematics Liyun Experimental Class, etc.)
- Physics (including Physics, Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Astronomy, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (including Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Psychology, Geographical Sciences, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Economics, Finance, Law, Business Administration, Accounting, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Education (including Education, Special Education, Preschool Education, Educational Technology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2562-3222, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Science Experimental Class and Social Science Experimental Class as main targets, with Tier 1 Mathematics and Physics as reach goals; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics including A-level Mathematics, Statistics); if your ranking is near the upper limit (around 3200), it is recommended to use Tier 3 Education as a safety option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 201st, 202nd, 173rd, 262nd, and 242nd respectively, with overall small fluctuations but a notable backward shift in 2024 (262nd) and a slight recovery to 242nd in 2025; over the past 3 years (2023-2025), the cumulative backward shift is about 69 places, with a baseline ranking of about 242nd in 2025; the university's planned enrollment in Guizhou Province for liberal arts/history category: 16 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 9 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 18, an increase of 9 from 2025 (100% increase), which will significantly intensify admission competition and push the minimum ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 19th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 13-19 range in recent years, placing it among the top national universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving responses to university management public opinion, with no major negative incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure; in 2022, Jiangxi experienced a significant drop in filing rankings (low attention), but no similar gaps were recorded in Guizhou; the fifth round of discipline evaluation includes 6 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, Marxist Theory), 3 A-level disciplines (Physical Education, Foreign Languages and Literature, Mathematics), and 9 A- disciplines (Chemistry, Philosophy, Law, Physics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Theoretical Economics, Ecology, Systems Science, Statistics), with a total of 18 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength and sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of teacher/education majors is divided and cautious, law is divided and cautious, and Chinese language/literature is recommended as relatively hot; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is about 299,000, with an estimated 89,700 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 30%, roughly unchanged from the 90,087 history candidates in 2025; Beijing Normal University's main campus is located in Beijing, not a local university in Guizhou, with no enrollment bias towards the province; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%-2% (about 9 out of total national enrollment in 2025), making it a 985 university with a relatively small enrollment scale in other provinces, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 242nd, the 2026 enrollment plan doubling from 9 to 18 (100% increase) as the biggest negative factor, and the university's top-tier level (19th in Soft Science), 18 A- or above advantageous disciplines' sustained appeal, neutral-to-positive reputation, and relatively hot Douyin popularity as positive factors, the ranking will still significantly shift backward after offsetting. The predicted minimum ranking is about 407th, with a range of 357-457th.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, Communication Studies, English, etc.)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Economics, Finance, Law, Sociology, Business Administration, Accounting, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- History Class (including History, History Liyun Experimental Class, Archaeology)
- Education Class (including Education, Special Education, Preschool Education, Educational Technology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- No other low-competition majors (only 3 enrollment categories in history, all covered by tiers)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 357-457, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Education Class and History Class, with Tier 1 Humanities Experimental Class and Social Sciences Experimental Class as reach options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 350), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors (Humanities Experimental Class includes A+ discipline Chinese Language and Literature).
